creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Can you try the patches I just uploaded, and let me know how you get on please?  The patches add a new radio-button option to rsyslog8 which lets you choose one out of:

   GnuTLS
   OpenSSL
   No ssl support

in rsyslog8.  I haven't confirmed this yet, but if you're enabling RELP support in rsyslog8 I suspect you'll either need to use the same TLS library as for librelp, or turn off both TLS libraries in rsyslog8.  Please let me know how you get on.

Matthew
